DISCOVERY 302, ASSIGNEE MIDLAND FUNDING LLC NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THIS MATTER WILL BE HEARD AT 9:30AM AT LINE 15 ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES WATSON; NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-21-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GENOVEVA HERNANDO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $500 SHALL BE IMMEDIATELY RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT TOWARDS THE JUDGMENT. THE REST OF THE AMOUNT HELD BY THE SHERIFF SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. BEGINNING SEPTEMBER 1, 2012, JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL MAKE PAYMENTS OF $500 PER MONTH UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Genoveva Hernando's Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. $500 shall be immediately released to the judgment creditor for payment towards the judgment. The rest of the amount held by the Sheriff shall be released to the judgment debtor. Beginning September 1, 2012, judgment debtor shall make payments of $500 per month until the judgment is satisfied. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ASSIGNEE MIDLAND FUNDING LLC NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
No appearances. This matter will be heard at 9:30am at Line 15 on the Law and Motion calendar. (301/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Not reported
